zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben於1017年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 洛拉賀海音費爾登 (巴登)時，他的父親Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden52歲，母親Richilde Von Schwaben27歲。他於大約1062年與Adelaide di Savoia結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1080年10月16日在德國薩辛維斯費爾斯霍恩莫爾森享年63歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿利可萊斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben于1017年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格可萊斯 洛拉賀海音費爾登 (巴登)时，他的父亲Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden52岁，母亲Richilde Von Schwaben27岁。他于大约1062年与Adelaide di Savoia结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1080年10月16日在德国薩辛維斯費爾斯霍恩莫爾森享年63岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿利可萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben was born in 1017, in Rheinfelden (Baden), Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, was 52 and his mother, Richilde Von Schwaben, was 27. He married Adelaide di Savoia about 1062. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 October 1080, in Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 63, and was buried in Saalekreis, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben est né en 1017, à Rheinfelden (Baden), Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Richilde Von Schwaben, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide di Savoia environ 1062. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1080, à Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Saalekreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben 1017 in Rheinfelden (Baden), Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden 52 und seine Mutter Richilde Von Schwaben 27. Er hat um 1062 Adelaide di Savoia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1080 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Saalekreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben è nato il nel 1017 nel Rheinfelden (Baden), Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Richilde Von Schwaben, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide di Savoia circa 1062. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1080, nel Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Saalekreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwabenが1017年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグクレイス ルoラチルヘインフエルデン (バデン)で生まれた時，父Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfeldenは52歳，母Richilde Von Schwabenは27歳であった。約1062年にAdelaide di Savoiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1080年10月16日にドイツサチセンウエイssエンフエルズホーヘンムoルセンで63歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトサアレクレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben(이)가 1017년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 크레이스 o라치 리인펠든 (바데)에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Richilde Von Schwaben(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1062년 Adelaide di Savoia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1080년 10월 16일 독일 작센 위ss프스 호헨o센에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 사알크레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben nasceu em 1017, em Rheinfelden (Baden), Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Richilde Von Schwaben, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide di Savoia aproximadamente 1062. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1080, em Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Saalekreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben родился в 1017 г. в местности раинфелден (баден), крис лoррэич, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Richilde Von Schwaben, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide di Savoia около 1062 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 октября 1080 г. в местности хохенмoлсен, виssенфелс, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности саеилекрис, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben nació en 1017, en Rheinfelden (Baden), Kreis Lörrach, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Pfalzgraf Kuno von Öhningen von Rheinfelden, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Richilde Von Schwaben, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Adelaide di Savoia aproximadamente 1062. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1080, en Hohenmölsen, Weißenfels, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Saalekreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
